title: English Thinking
objective: Students will explore english thinking concepts including Monitoring Comprehension.

steps.content: Let's discover the amazing world of Monitoring Comprehension!
Notice the difference between decoding words and actually understanding them — recognise when you've read the words but not grasped the meaning, and do something about it
Time to try this out: comprehension monitoring research
After you reads a paragraph or listens to an explanation, do they notice when they haven't really understood it — rather than just carrying on as if they had?
Amazing work! Let's review what we discovered about Monitoring Comprehension. comprehension monitoring research Metacognitive Monitoring in Reading Comprehension (MDPI 2024)
